candidates.snippet: s Fakt Greek Design Information TYPE BY Fakt, designed by Thomas Thiemich, is a highly functional sanserif. Released in 2010, it is Theimich's second commercially released typeface, following his humanist sanserif Alto.

rif. Released in 2010, it is Theimich's second commercially released typeface, following his humanist sanserif Alto. In 2020 Fakt has been updated to support Greek and Cyrillic scripts. Different from Alto, whose design
